name: Israeli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel cucumbers and cut in half lengthwise. Remove seeds and center pulp.
2. Dice cucumber flesh and measure out 2 cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except cucumber. Toss until well mixed.
4. Add diced cucumber flesh to the mixture and toss again.
5. Serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 7g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 51 Low-sodium diets. Omit salt
